name: User profile & identity settings
description: Implement user profile read and update with avatar management. Backend: GET /api/v1/users/me (return id, displayName, email, avatarUrl, createdAt) and PATCH /api/v1/users/me (update displayName with trim/non-empty/max-100 validation and avatarUrl). Frontend: Profile Settings page with display-name form, optimistic UI update, inline error handling, and avatar flow: square crop + client-side compression + upload to Firebase Storage + persist public URL to backend profile. Out of scope: identity-provider linking/unlinking and household membership display (Phase 2 per docs/product-specs/profile-management.md).
